_publications._publicationTitle: Cell of origin and microenvironment contribution for NF1-associated dermal neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Cre mediated recombination would be expected to generate Nf1-/- SKPs. This was verified by genomic analysis of the Nf1 gene and by X-gal staining for LacZ expression
details: Cre-mediated recombination successfully generated Nf1-/- SKPs from Nf1 flox/- mice, verified by genomic analysis and X-gal staining
